name: Walnut Penuche
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast walnuts: Spread a single layer in a 9-inch glass pie plate. Stirring every two minutes, microwave on high for 6 minutes, or until toasted.
2. Melt butter in a 2-quart glass measure. Microwave on high for one minute.
3. Blend in brown sugar and condensed milk. Stirring every 2 minutes, microwave on high for 8-9 minutes, or until the mixture is a medium-caramel color.
4. Stir in vanilla and beat with a wooden spoon for 2-3 minutes.
5. Fold in toasted walnuts.
6. Pour into buttered 8-inch square dish.
7. Cool to lukewarm; then refrigerate until set.
8. Cut into squares. Makes 36 pieces.
